recommendations:
Neeraj Deshmukh

Pranit is a very hard-working and dedicated person. I closely worked with him on many projects.He was easy to approach and our collaboration was smoother. He has a good knowledge of front-end technologies.He is a nice happy person and also a good photographer.I really enjoyed working with him and hope we'll work together again in the future.

Shruti Satkar

Pranit is an exceptional developer. He is so dedicated to his work. He has been a great resource to the company, He is a highly-skilled, experienced, and helpful professional with a positive attitude. Moreover, I have seen him working his way through challenges and crises. He is truly an inspiration to me.
